AK BETS @AKBets · 53min How is this not illegal?
@LloydsBank an absolute disgrace.
RT and show big companies and governments they need to stay out of our personal lives.
I’ll vote for any political party that leaves me alone to make my own decisions. Cita SimonNott @SimonNott · 3h This is what we are up against, I wonder if this will include buying drinks and food at racecourses or buying tickets to race meetings? Maybe racecourses will need to rethink their ‘Cashless’ policy. @BHAStewards @arenaracingco @JCvenues 2 1 13 3 mil
